title: Keep automations when using a template (not having to set them up anew)
excerpt: Having made quite an effort to create a template board for a recurring process (including many automations) I have noticed that when creating a new board from this template, all automations concerning outlook-integration…

posts.author: mbe (mb)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having made quite an effort to create a template board for a recurring process (including many automations) I have noticed that when creating a new board from this template, all automations concerning outlook-integrations will not be carried over.
You have to set them up completely from scratch.
Even creating templates for the automations will only give you the backbone, you have to re-fill all the content, including the e-mail content text template.
Also, copying an existing board instead of using the master template will get you the same results.
My suggestion:
Keep all the automations and their content but deactivate them until the outkook integration is set up. Then you can re-activate the automations. This is way less work than having to create all of the automations manually over and over again.
